generated_oml:
instance PostOccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy data collection devices for environmental monitoring in LEED Platinum academic building"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BuildingSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance BuildingSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PostOccupancySensor
]

instance SensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data collected from building systems for monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BuildingSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for controlling lighting systems within Building Control System (BCS)"
]

    base:desc "Actuator for controlling HVAC systems within Building Control System (BCS)"
]

    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin management platform for device management and data synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D visualization engine for interactive building simulation and display"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance BIMTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling tools for creating and enriching semantic models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, EnergyOptimizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering approach for automated generation of runtime interfaces and model-driven deployment process including requirements elicitation, BIM enrichment, semantics extraction, and ODTE validation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, EnergyOptimizationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, InteractiveVisualizationService
]

]

]

    base:desc "LEED Platinum academic building in Living Lab context for real-time monitoring, simulation, and optimization of building operations"

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
